problem id: 66b1c512
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(7) AND NOT SHR(6)) XOR NOT SHL(4)

examples:
  01101110 -> 00101001
  11100111 -> 01111111
  10011110 -> 01010010
  10011011 -> 10000010
  10101001 -> 10111011
  01110111 -> 00110101
  11010000 -> 10010111
  01001001 -> 11001011
  10100001 -> 00111111
  00000011 -> 01001110

query: 00011011
predicted answer: 11000010
